products.name: Hangar
products.description: A local-first infrastructure dashboard for indie hackers and solo devs. Monitor all your services, see live status, and launch anything instantly — no backend, no signup, runs entirely in your browser.

products.name: RocketLaunch
products.description: The launch platform built for indie hackers who ship fast and build in public. Also the distribution backbone for every future TrioRockets product.

products.name: MomentumOS
products.description: A focused system for building compounding habits — designed for professionals who treat personal growth as a practice, not a resolution.

products.name: CreatorTools
products.tagline: Micro SaaS Tool Directory for Creators
products.description: A curated set of micro tools for creators — OG image generators, tweet carousels, code screenshots, blog-to-thread converters, and more. Ship content faster with tools built for the modern creator stack.

products.name: Nexus
products.description: A secure, organization-scoped contact registry for professionals who maintain large networks. Structured identities, event-based sourcing, geographic clustering, fuzzy deduplication, and field-level encryption — built for the contacts you actually collected at job fairs, conferences, and campus visits.

products.name: SchoolOS
products.description: Multi-tenant SaaS built for institutions — attendance, communication, fee management, and administration unified under one operational layer.
